NAVAREA XIX 71/17
GRENLAND SEA

 NAVIGATION IS DANGEROUS DUE TO ROCKET CARRIER ELEMENTS FALL 
DAILY 14 TO 17 JUL FROM 0630 TO 0800 UTC
IN ELLIPSE SHAPED AREA CENTRED 82-08N 00-36W
LARGE AXIS 130 MILES AND SMALL AXIS 54 MILES
AZIMUTH OF LARGE AXIS 292 DEGREES
